value.found_quote: MCP servers can be configured at three scopes. The scope you choose controls which projects the server loads in and whether the configuration is shared with your team.
value.rationale: The page has a dedicated "MCP installation scopes" section describing local, project, and user scopes, each controlling which projects the server loads in, whether it's shared, and which configuration file it's stored in (~/.claude.json or .mcp.json). This directly substantiates the claim.
